overview: EduCampus – Smart Notice Board is a full-stack web app for campus announcements. Admins post and manage notices across categories (Academic, Events, Sports, General). Students browse, search, and view notices with file attachments. Features role-based login, beautiful dark/light themes, and analytics charts.
features: Role-based login for Admin and Student
Admin notice management: create, edit, delete
Search and filter notices by title, category, or description
Pie chart and Line chart analytics dashboard
Category color tags and card-based notice display
Dark/Light theme toggle with localStorage persistence
Sidebar layout with responsive mobile support
Pre-populated sample data with demo accounts
